features: 4 cans of each Fresh Linen, Citrus Zing, Sparkling Berry & Jasmine Essence
Compatible with Airwick & Airpure Automatic Air Freshener Dispenser
Perfect variety for any spaces, like your kitchen, bathroom, living room, bedroom, office, or even commercial spaces.
description: Product description Revitalize your home, office, or any indoor space with this selection of Fragrances. This set includes 12 x 250ml refills compatible with all common Automatic Air Freshener Dispenser with 250ml Refill slot. The formula of these is specifically designed to eliminate unwanted odors and replace them with a bright, energizing citrus aroma that can last for hours, ensuring your environment stays fresh throughout the day. Perfect variety for any spaces, like your kitchen, bathroom, living room, bedroom, office, or even commercial spaces.
